items.front: Under 2-8-1, when must RVR values be furnished?
items.back: Where RVR equipment is operational, furnish values for the runway in use irrespective of subsequent operation/nonoperation of navigational or visual aids.

items.front: Under 2-8-2, what are the three triggers for issuing touchdown RVR?
items.back: 1. Prevailing visibility 1 mile or less (regardless of RVR value). 2. RVR indicates a reportable value (6,000 ft or less) regardless of visibility. 3. When RVR value is within 400 ft of actual conditions.

items.front: Under 2-8-2, when must mid-point and rollout RVR be reported in addition to touchdown RVR?
items.back: When either value is less than 2,000 feet AND the touchdown RVR is greater than 2,000 feet.

items.front: Under 2-8-3, what are reportable RVR values?
